title: Nila Nee Vaanam Lyrics Pokkisham
stanzas:
Nila, nee vaanam kaatru
mazhai, en kavidhai moochu
isai, thuli thaena malara
dhisai oli pagal. (2)

sinungal sirippu mutham
mounam kanavu yekkam
megam minnal ovaiyam
chellam priyam imisai

idhil yaavume
neethaan eninum
uyir endre unai solvene
naan unnidam
uyir nee ennidam
naam enbathe inimel
mei sugam

Nila, nee vaanam kaatru
mazhai, en kavidhai moochu
isai, thuli thaena malara
dhisai oli pagal.

anbulla thirukuralae
anbulla natrinaiye
anbulla badavaa
anbulla thirudaa
anbulla  rasiga
anbulla  kirukkaa

idhil yaavume
ingu neethaan endraal
enna naan sollu sol neeye
paeranbile ondru naam
serndhida
veen vaarthaigal ini
yaen thaedida.

Nila, nee vaanam kaatru
mazhai, en kavidhai moochu
isai, thuli thaena malara
dhisai oli pagal.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nila Nee Vaanam'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and connection, using beautiful metaphors related to nature.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Pokkisham'?

This song plays during a pivotal romantic moment, highlighting the bond between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of 'Nila Nee Vaanam'?

The song features the talented voices of Chinmayi and Vijay Yesudas.

Who composed the music for 'Nila Nee Vaanam'?

The music was composed by Sabesh-Murali, known for their melodious tunes.

When was 'Nila Nee Vaanam' released?

The song was released on August 14, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nila Nee Vaanam, the singers Chinmayi and Vijay Yesudas deliver a heartfelt melody that encapsulates the beauty of love. The song unfolds in a romantic context within Pokkisham, where the characters express their emotions through poetic lyrics. The soothing composition by Sabesh-Murali enhances the nostalgic feel, making it a perfect choice for intimate moments. Overall, the song evokes a sense of longing and affection, resonating with anyone who has experienced love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nila Nee Vaanam from Pokkisham is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Chinmayi's ethereal voice paired with Vijay Yesudas's heartfelt rendition, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates deeply with listeners. The enchanting lyrics by Yugabharathi and the melodious composition by Sabesh-Murali make this track a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: Moon, you are the sky, the rain of the wind, my poetry, the music of my breath, the direction of the flower's dew, the light of the day.
A deity, a butterfly, a little Tamil child.
Laughter of the stars, a kiss of silence, a dream of clouds, a lightning bolt, my beloved music.
In this, you are everything to me, I will say that you are my life. You are my life, and we will be together from now on, truth and happiness.
Moon, you are the sky, the rain of the wind, my poetry, the music of my breath, the direction of the flower's dew, the light of the day.
Beloved king, beloved dream, beloved companion, beloved eyes.
Beloved sound, beloved Tamil, beloved actions, beloved symbol.
Beloved sacred words, beloved nature, beloved troubles, beloved thief, beloved fan, beloved wanderer.
Beloved darkness, beloved mistakes, beloved life, beloved love.
In this, if you are everything, what can I say? You are the one who speaks, we have come together, why search for words anymore?
Moon, you are the sky, the rain of the wind, my poetry, the music of my breath, the direction of the flower's dew, the light of the day.
Beloved king, beloved dream, beloved companion, beloved eyes.
